faq.title: Common Enquiries
faq.description: Everything you need to know about the Mirall ecosystem.

items.question: How secure is my data on Mirall?
items.answer: We use AES-256 bit encryption for data at rest and TLS 1.3 for data in transit. Your files are fragmented across multiple secure data centers, ensuring that only you hold the decryption keys.

items.question: Are there limits on file sizes?
items.answer: Mirall supports individual file uploads up to 250GB on our professional plans, and unlimited total storage for enterprise customers.

items.question: Can I use Mirall with my existing workflow?
items.answer: Yes, Mirall integrates seamlessly with Adobe Creative Cloud, Slack, Microsoft Teams, and Figma through our dedicated plugins and robust API.

items.question: What happens if I cancel my subscription?
items.answer: Your data remains accessible in read-only mode for 90 days after cancellation, allowing you ample time to migrate your assets if needed.

cta.title: Ready to elevate your workflow?
cta.description: Join over 50,000 teams who have already upgraded to a faster, more beautiful way of sharing.

footer.tagline: The high-end editorial tech for creative file management. Built for speed, designed for clarity.
